extracted_rules.statement: Project: Baidu Apollo Autonomous Driving System (Planning & Control Module)
The system is a Level 4 autonomous driving platform operating in mixed traffic environments
It must strictly adhere to the "Apollo Pilot Safety Report" and the "EM Motion Planner" specifications
[Safety Requirements - Based on Apollo Pilot Safety Report]
- The system must implement "Passive Safety" (collision protection), "Active Safety" (ACC, AEB, LKA), and "Functional Safety" (fail-safe mechanisms)
- Upon detecting a critical system failure (e
, sensor loss, localization failure) or exiting the ODD, the vehicle must NOT simply stop in lane immediately if unsafe
It must execute an MRM to safely pull over or stop in a low-risk zone within a specific time window
- The system operates in specific urban and highway scenarios
